name: chart-radar-default
visual_summary: Chart Radar Default is a component used to display radar charts. It is typically used in data-heavy applications where radar charts are necessary to visualize complex data sets. A developer would use this component when they need to showcase multi-dimensional data in an intuitive and clear manner.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready chart component with the following characteristics:

Name: chart-radar-default
Description: Chart Radar Default is a component used to display radar charts. It is typically used in data-heavy applications where radar charts are necessary to visualize complex data sets. A developer would use this component when they need to showcase multi-dimensional data in an intuitive and clear manner.
Style: grid, responsive, modern
Interactions: hover, legend toggle
Tags: data visualization, chart, radar chart, complex data sets

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
